name: Amaretto Peach Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain and puree the peach halves.
2. Combine melted margarine and sugar until light and fluffy. Blend in the egg.
3. Add flour; mix well. Spread dough onto the bottom of a 9-inch springform pan.
4. Bake at 450 degrees F., for 10 minutes.
5. In another bowl, combine cream cheese, sugar, and flour; mix until well blended.
6. Add eggs one at a time, mixing well after each addition.
7. Add peaches and liqueur; mix well.
8. Pour the mixture over the crust.
9. Bake at 450 degrees F., for an additional 10 minutes.
10. Reduce oven temperature to 250 degrees F. Continue baking for 65 more minutes.
11. Loosen cake from the rim of the pan; cool before removing the rim of the pan.
12. Chill. Garnish with additional peach slices and sliced almonds, if desired.
